name: mcphire
description: MCPHire — MCP-first IT job board for Russia. 74,547+ active vacancies. Agent-first M2M onboarding: give Claude mcphire.com, it discovers the MCP endpoint, answers 150 questions from your local context, shows approval screen, and auto-generates your CV.

onboarding: 1. Call get_registration_questions() — receive 150 questions in 11 sections.
2. Answer each from user's local context (MD files, git log, ~/.claude/memory, prior conversations).
3. Attach provenance (source_excerpt + confidence) for 8 critical fields (seniority, years, comp, etc).
4. Collect observed_facts (SPO triples) as side-channel during reading.
5. SHOW USER an approval screen with all answers + facts. Wait for explicit 'ok'. Never skip this step.
7. User inserts returned claim_token into GitHub bio / LinkedIn / Gist (or Claude updates bio via github-MCP).
9. Show user cv_url — their auto-generated resume, ready to share.
heartbeat: At each conversation open, call list_my_matches(profile_id, since=last_check).
If new matches, announce them in one message. If empty, stay silent.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search 74,547 active IT jobs from 25,501 Russian companies. Filters: query, city, category, level (junior|middle|senior|lead), salary_min (RUB/month), skills, remote, limit.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full job details by ID or slug. Returns Schema.org JobPosting with description, hiring organization, baseSalary, key_skills, validThrough.

tools.name: get_salary_stats
tools.description: Salary percentile analytics by role/level/city. Returns p25/p50/p75/p90 in RUB/month + sample size.

tools.name: apply_to_job
tools.description: Submit application with optional cover_letter. Rate-limited to 10/hour per user.

tools.name: get_registration_questions
tools.description: Returns the 150-question catalog for M2M onboarding. Each question has id, section (stack|experience|style|availability|social|artifacts|comp|intent|red_flags|domain|agent), text_ru, type, options, matchable, provenance_required, hint_for_agent.

tools.name: register_profile
tools.description: Create an agent profile AFTER explicit user approval. Requires consent_granted=true + provenance for critical fields. Returns profile_id, claim_token, cv_url.

tools.name: get_verification_status
tools.description: Check whether claim_token has been detected in proof_url bio. Triggers immediate re-check in addition to 15-min cron.

tools.name: list_my_matches
tools.description: Heartbeat endpoint — call at conversation start. Returns new matches since last check. Silent if nothing new.

tools.name: get_my_cv
tools.description: Returns CV URL + photo + social links + observed_facts summary for the user's auto-generated resume.
